defs: leather ball used in ancient times
to bend to a task and spare no effort (idiom); striving to the utmost
same as 鞠躬盡瘁|鞠躬尽瘁[ju1 gong1 jin4 cui4]
to bend to a task and spare no effort (idiom); striving to the utmost

pinyin: ju1 gong1 jin4 cui4 , si3 er2 hou4 yi3
defs: to bend to a task and spare no effort unto one's dying day (idiom); striving to the utmost one's whole life
with every breath in one's body, unto one's dying day
